messages.content: Say hello.
HELLO! HOW CAN I HELP YOU TODAY?
Tell me about cats.
CATS ARE SMALL FURRY ANIMALS THAT MANY PEOPLE KEEP AS PETS.
What is the weather like?
THE WEATHER IS SUNNY AND WARM TODAY.
Give me a fruit.
APPLES AND BANANAS ARE DELICIOUS FRUITS.
Describe the ocean.
THE OCEAN IS VAST DEEP AND FULL OF MARINE LIFE.
How do I make tea?
BOIL WATER POUR IT OVER TEA LEAVES AND STEEP FOR A FEW MINUTES.
What is your favorite color?
I REALLY ENJOY THE COLOR BLUE BECAUSE IT IS CALM.
Recommend a book.
I RECOMMEND READING A GOOD ADVENTURE NOVEL.
Tell me a fact.
HONEY NEVER SPOILS IF STORED PROPERLY.
Say goodbye.
GOODBYE AND HAVE A WONDERFUL DAY AHEAD.
